guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 54. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_sp: Point to the big SP and say: spspsp. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_st: Now point to the big ST and say: ststst.

parent_story: A spider sat on a spoon. A star shone on the stairs.
